allow: Bash(rm -f vivado.jou vivado.log gen_hdl_vivado_log.txt dfx_runtime.txt voice_input.wav voice_output.wav)

Bash(matlab -batch "addpath\('models/bpsk'\); load_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim'\); blocks = find_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim/DUT/BPSK_Mod_HDL'\); fprintf\('BPSK_Mod_HDL blocks:\\n'\); for i=1:length\(blocks\), if i>1, fprintf\('  %s\\n', blocks{i}\); end; end; fprintf\('\\nBPSK_Demod_HDL blocks:\\n'\); blocks2 = find_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim/DUT/BPSK_Demod_HDL'\); for i=1:length\(blocks2\), if i>1, fprintf\('  %s\\n', blocks2{i}\); end; end; close_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim', 0\)")

Bash(matlab -batch "addpath\('models/bpsk'\); load_system\('voice_tx_hdl_cosim'\); % Main path modulator; mods = find_system\('voice_tx_hdl_cosim', 'Name','BPSK_Mod_HDL'\); fprintf\('Found %d BPSK_Mod_HDL:\\n', length\(mods\)\); for i=1:length\(mods\), fprintf\('  %s\\n  blocks: ', mods{i}\); blocks = find_system\(mods{i}, 'SearchDepth',1\); for j=2:length\(blocks\), fprintf\('%s, ', strrep\(blocks{j}, [mods{i} '/'], ''\)\); end; fprintf\('\\n'\); end; demods = find_system\('voice_tx_hdl_cosim', 'Name','BPSK_Demod_HDL'\); fprintf\('Found %d BPSK_Demod_HDL:\\n', length\(demods\)\); for i=1:length\(demods\), fprintf\('  %s\\n  blocks: ', demods{i}\); blocks = find_system\(demods{i}, 'SearchDepth',1\); for j=2:length\(blocks\), fprintf\('%s, ', strrep\(blocks{j}, [demods{i} '/'], ''\)\); end; fprintf\('\\n'\); end; close_system\('voice_tx_hdl_cosim', 0\)")

Bash(matlab -batch "addpath\('models/bpsk'\); load_system\('voice_tx_hdl_cosim'\); fid=fopen\('check_blocks.txt','w'\); mods=find_system\('voice_tx_hdl_cosim','Name','BPSK_Mod_HDL'\); for i=1:length\(mods\), fprintf\(fid,'MOD: %s\\n',mods{i}\); b=find_system\(mods{i},'SearchDepth',1\); for j=2:length\(b\), fprintf\(fid,'  %s \(%s\)\\n',strrep\(b{j},[mods{i} '/'],''\),get_param\(b{j},'BlockType'\)\); end; end; demods=find_system\('voice_tx_hdl_cosim','Name','BPSK_Demod_HDL'\); for i=1:length\(demods\), fprintf\(fid,'DEMOD: %s\\n',demods{i}\); b=find_system\(demods{i},'SearchDepth',1\); for j=2:length\(b\), fprintf\(fid,'  %s \(%s\)\\n',strrep\(b{j},[demods{i} '/'],''\),get_param\(b{j},'BlockType'\)\); end; end; fclose\(fid\); close_system\('voice_tx_hdl_cosim',0\); fprintf\('Done\\n'\)")

Bash(matlab -batch "addpath\('models/bpsk'\); load_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim'\); fid=fopen\('check_blocks2.txt','w'\); % DUT mod/demod; mods=find_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim/DUT','SearchDepth',1,'Name','BPSK_Mod_HDL'\); fprintf\(fid,'MOD: %s\\n',mods{1}\); b=find_system\(mods{1},'SearchDepth',1\); for j=2:length\(b\), fprintf\(fid,'  %s \(%s\)\\n',strrep\(b{j},[mods{1} '/'],''\),get_param\(b{j},'BlockType'\)\); end; demods=find_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim/DUT','SearchDepth',1,'Name','BPSK_Demod_HDL'\); fprintf\(fid,'DEMOD: %s\\n',demods{1}\); b=find_system\(demods{1},'SearchDepth',1\); for j=2:length\(b\), fprintf\(fid,'  %s \(%s\)\\n',strrep\(b{j},[demods{1} '/'],''\),get_param\(b{j},'BlockType'\)\); end; % Also check port handles; ports=get_param\('bpsk_hdl_cosim/DUT/BPSK_Mod_HDL/bit_in','PortHandles'\); fprintf\(fid,'bit_in PortNumber: %d\\n',ports.Inport\); ports2=get_param\('bpsk_hdl_cosim/DUT/BPSK_Mod_HDL/sym_out','PortHandles'\); fprintf\(fid,'sym_out PortNumber: %d\\n',ports2.Outport\); fclose\(fid\); close_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim',0\); fprintf\('Done\\n'\)")

Bash(matlab -batch "load_system\('models/dbpsk/dbpsk_hdl_cosim'\); ss='dbpsk_hdl_cosim/DUT/BPSK_Mod_HDL'; open_system\(ss\); % Get all line details; lines=get_param\(ss,'Lines'\); fid=fopen\('line_debug.txt','w'\); for i=1:length\(lines\), src_h=get_param\(lines\(i\),'SrcBlockHandle'\); dst_h=get_param\(lines\(i\),'DstBlockHandle'\); if src_h>0 && dst_h>0, fprintf\(fid,'%s\(%d\) -> %s\(%d\)\\n', get_param\(src_h,'Name'\), get_param\(lines\(i\),'SrcPort'\), get_param\(dst_h,'Name'\), get_param\(lines\(i\),'DstPort'\)\); end; end; fclose\(fid\); close_system\('dbpsk_hdl_cosim',0\); fprintf\('Done\\n'\)")

Bash(matlab -batch "addpath\('models/bpsk'\); load_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim'\); ss='bpsk_hdl_cosim/DUT/BPSK_Mod_HDL'; ph=get_param\([ss '/bit_in'],'PortHandles'\); ln=get_param\(ph.Outport\(1\),'Line'\); fprintf\('Line type: %s, value: %d\\n', class\(ln\), ln\); if ln ~= -1, fprintf\('Deleting line...\\n'\); delete_line\(ln\); fprintf\('Deleted OK\\n'\); end; close_system\('bpsk_hdl_cosim',0\); fprintf\('Done\\n'\)")

Bash(matlab -batch "copyfile\('models/bpsk/bpsk_hdl_cosim.slx','models/dbpsk/_test.slx'\); cd\('models/dbpsk'\); load_system\('_test'\); ss='_test/DUT/BPSK_Mod_HDL'; open_system\(ss,'force'\); % Disconnect; ph_in=get_param\([ss '/bit_in'],'PortHandles'\); ln=get_param\(ph_in.Outport\(1\),'Line'\); if ln~=-1,delete_line\(ln\);end; % Add XOR; add_block\('simulink/Logic and Bit Operations/Logical Operator',[ss '/Diff_XOR'],'Operator','XOR'\); add_block\('simulink/Discrete/Unit Delay',[ss '/Diff_Reg'],'InitialCondition','0','SampleTime','-1'\); % Connect; delay_blk=[ss '/Delay']; ph_xor=get_param\([ss '/Diff_XOR'],'PortHandles'\); ph_delay=get_param\(delay_blk,'PortHandles'\); ph_reg=get_param\([ss '/Diff_Reg'],'PortHandles'\); add_line\(ss,ph_in.Outport\(1\),ph_xor.Inport\(1\),'autorouting','on'\); add_line\(ss,ph_xor.Outport\(1\),ph_delay.Inport\(1\),'autorouting','on'\); add_line\(ss,ph_xor.Outport\(1\),ph_reg.Inport\(1\),'autorouting','on'\); add_line\(ss,ph_reg.Outport\(1\),ph_xor.Inport\(2\),'autorouting','on'\); fprintf\('All connections done.\\n'\); set_param\(ss,'Name','DBPSK_Mod_HDL'\); save_system\('_test'\); close_system\('_test'\); fprintf\('Saved OK\\n'\)")

Bash(matlab -batch "copyfile\('models/bpsk/bpsk_hdl_cosim.slx','models/dbpsk/_test.slx'\); cd\('models/dbpsk'\); load_system\('_test'\); ss='_test/DUT/BPSK_Mod_HDL'; open_system\(ss,'force'\); ph_in=get_param\([ss '/bit_in'],'PortHandles'\); ln=get_param\(ph_in.Outport\(1\),'Line'\); if ln~=-1,delete_line\(ln\);fprintf\('Line deleted\\n'\);end; add_block\('simulink/Logic and Bit Operations/Logical Operator',[ss '/Diff_XOR'],'Operator','XOR'\); fprintf\('XOR added\\n'\); add_block\('simulink/Discrete/Unit Delay',[ss '/Diff_Reg'],'InitialCondition','0','SampleTime','-1'\); fprintf\('Reg added\\n'\); ph_xor=get_param\([ss '/Diff_XOR'],'PortHandles'\); delay_blk=[ss '/Delay']; ph_delay=get_param\(delay_blk,'PortHandles'\); ph_reg=get_param\([ss '/Diff_Reg'],'PortHandles'\); add_line\(ss,ph_in.Outport\(1\),ph_xor.Inport\(1\),'autorouting','on'\); fprintf\('Line 1 OK\\n'\); add_line\(ss,ph_xor.Outport\(1\),ph_delay.Inport\(1\),'autorouting','on'\); fprintf\('Line 2 OK\\n'\); add_line\(ss,ph_xor.Outport\(1\),ph_reg.Inport\(1\),'autorouting','on'\); fprintf\('Line 3 OK\\n'\); add_line\(ss,ph_reg.Outport\(1\),ph_xor.Inport\(2\),'autorouting','on'\); fprintf\('Line 4 OK\\n'\); set_param\(ss,'Name','DBPSK_Mod_HDL'\); fprintf\('Renamed\\n'\); save_system\('_test'\); close_system\('_test'\); fprintf\('Done\\n'\)")
